query: SELECT id, guestName, guestEmail, requestedDate, mealType, paymentStatus, reminderEmailSent FROM bookings WHERE guestName LIKE '%Daniel%' AND requestedDate = '2026-03-22' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 1
